PreToolUse.Write: echo '[$(date +%H:%M)] Writing file - logging to CLAUDE.md if bug fix'
PreToolUse.Edit: echo '[$(date +%H:%M)] Editing file - logging to CLAUDE.md if bug fix'

PostToolUse.Bash: if echo "$CLAUDE_LAST_BASH" | grep -qE '(playwright test|pytest|npm test)'; then echo 'Test run detected'; fi

hooks.SessionStart: cat CLAUDE.md AGENTS.md FIX_PATTERNS.md 2>/dev/null | head -300 || echo 'No constitution files found - read them first'
